title: Battery
subtitle: Real-time power monitoring
charging_desc: Pack is absorbing energy from the adapter. Charge rate depends on TDP budget and thermals.
discharging_desc: Pack is discharging. Lowering TDP or brightness is the fastest way to extend runtime.
health_good: Battery is healthy. No action needed.
health_moderate: Moderate wear. Consider enabling charge limit to slow degradation.
health_poor: Significant wear. Replacement may be worth considering.
no_history: No history yet. Data is recorded every minute.
